log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable with a size of 2MB, and it has been detected as a spreader and an overlay. The available sandboxes are CAPA, Tencent HABO, and VirusTotal Cuckoofork. I should investiga
The malware has communicated with 3 unique domains and 3 unique IPs, and has dropped 3 files. There are no registry persistence keys found. I should investigate the network activity to understand the

The malware has communicated with 3 unique domains and 3 unique IPs, and has made 2 HTTP GET requests to www.supernetforme.com. The user agent is a fake IE6 user agent. I should investigate the capabi

The malware has various capabilities, including delayed execution, memory allocation, process termination, and file writing. It also has anti-debugging capabilities, such as checking for time delays v
The malware does not use any registry keys for persistence. I should investigate the dropped files to understand the malware's behavior and potential payloads.
The malware has dropped three files: acrotray .exe, acrotray.exe, and wmpscfgs.exe. I should investigate the process activity to understand how these files are executed and interact with the system.
